name: Vitamin E+B3 Clear & Glow Face Wash
short: A clarifying face wash with Vitamin E, niacinamide, and AHA+BHA to unclog pores, fight acne, and brighten skin.
description: Vitamin E+B3 Clear & Glow is a clarifying daily face wash that combines the brightening power of niacinamide (Vitamin B3) with the soothing, antioxidant protection of Vitamin E. A blend of glycolic, lactic, and salicylic acids gently exfoliates and unclogs pores, while aloe vera keeps skin comfortable. Cellulose beads provide a satisfying physical polish that rinses clean away. Use daily for visibly clearer, smoother, more radiant skin.
benefits: Unclogs pores with AHA+BHA blend (glycolic, lactic, salicylic)
Niacinamide brightens and Vitamin E protects
usage: Massage a pea-sized amount onto damp skin in circular motions for 30 seconds. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water. Use morning and evening. Suitable for combination, oily, and blemish-prone skin.
